Make Hand and Right Arm glorious. Cp. Exod. xv. 6; Is. li. 9, lili. 10, Ixil. 8, Ixiii. 12. 7. Waken indignation. Cp. Ps. Ixxviii. 38. pour out wrath. Cp. Ps, Ixxix. 6 (‘ pour out thy wrath upon the heathen that know thee not’).
